description_long: This object represents a stylized human jogger with exaggerated, distorted limbs and a highly abstracted form. The figure wears a torn, light blue top and a white skirt with visible rips, suggesting a casual or distressed look. The head is marked by a dark bun hairstyle and a white 'X' across the face, giving it a unique, almost cartoonish appearance. The arms are elongated and stretched outward, while the legs are bent in a running pose, with one foot forward and the other back. The shoes are simple and gray, matching the overall minimalist color palette. The surface appears matte and hard, with visible polygonal edges and a lack of fine detail.
description: A stylized jogger with exaggerated limbs, a torn blue top, white skirt, and a distinctive 'X' on the face, posed in a running motion.
description_view_0: Front view showing the jogger's face with an 'X', torn blue top, white skirt, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme elongation of the arms and the bent running posture of the legs.
description_view_2: Close-up, mostly obscured view with little detail visible, primarily showing a dark, featureless area.
description_view_3: Angled side view emphasizing the stretched limbs, running pose, and the torn clothing details.
attribute_clothing_type: Torn, fitted light blue top with a wide neckline and a distressed white knee-length skirt with visible rips.
attribute_footwear_type: Simple gray slip-on shoes with a flat sole and no visible brand markings.
attribute_running_posture: The jogger is depicted in a dynamic running pose with an upright torso, extremely elongated arms stretched outward, and bent legs suggesting forward motion.
